# Validation

- [ ] `cmake --preset windows-debug`
- [ ] `cmake --build --preset windows-debug`
- [ ] `ctest --preset windows-debug --output-on-failure`
- [ ] Release build/test, if relevant
- [ ] Viewer launched, if relevant

# Checklist

- [ ] Public API changes are deliberate and documented.
- [ ] Third-party types do not leak through public Elf3D headers.
- [ ] Documentation was updated for behavior, validation, or release-status changes.
- [ ] No confidential models, customer data, credentials, local build outputs, or generated archives are included.
- [ ] Third-party license notices are preserved when dependencies or assets change.
